subcodes.first_line: O My dear one! Thy letters were perused. Glory be to Him Who hath aided thee in this great bounty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای عزیز من مکاتیب شما ملاحظه گردید سبحان من ایدک علی هذا الفضل العظیم
subcodes.subjects: @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @status of kings; future of monarchy, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @prayer for governments and rulers, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @justice and wrath of God
